parameters.query: SELECT t.ticket_id, t.account_id, t.account_name, t.subject, t.description, t.requester_email, t.requester_name, t.csm, t.account_segment, t.package, t.sf_account_id FROM `guesty-data.zendesk_analytics.tickets_clean` t WHERE IFNULL(t.gus_ticket, FALSE) = TRUE AND t.ticket_status = 'solved' AND IFNULL(t.deleted, FALSE) = FALSE AND t.updated_at >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC LIMIT 100

=SELECT mp.name AS partner_name FROM `guesty-data.datalake_glue.marketplace_integrations` mi JOIN `guesty-data.datalake_glue.marketplace_partners` mp ON mi.partnerid = mp._id WHERE mi.accountid = '{{$json.account_id}}' AND mi.active = TRUE AND IFNULL(mp.isdeleted, FALSE) = FALSE AND mp.active = TRUE ORDER BY mp.name

parameters.subject: =[TEST] GUS Upsell Lead -- Customer: {{$json.requester_name}} | CSM: {{$json.csm}}
parameters.message:
=[TEST MODE -- This email would normally be sent to: {{$json.requester_name}} ({{$json.requester_email}}) with CC to CSM: {{$json.csm}} ({{$json.csm_email}})]

---

Hi {{$json.requester_name}},

Thank you for reaching out to Guesty support. Based on our conversation about {{$json.detected_pain_point}}, I truly believe {{$json.recommended_addon}} would be the perfect solution for you.

{{$json.partner_upsell_line}}

I have looped in your dedicated Customer Success Manager, who will be in touch shortly to walk you through the details and answer any questions.

Best,
The Guesty Team

parameters.subject: Following up on your Guesty support conversation
